title: Add Upcoming Attractions Timeline (2027-2029) with AI-Generated Images

requirements.summary: Create UpcomingAttractionsSection component displaying future park expansions in timeline format organized by year (2027, 2028, 2029)
acceptanceCriteria: Section displays attractions organized by opening year (2027, 2028, 2029)
Each year grouping shows all attractions scheduled for that year
Section uses consistent styling with existing Section components
Component is added to home page alongside other sections

file_operations.description: Create new section component that displays upcoming attractions grouped by year (2027, 2028, 2029) in timeline format. Use existing Section component for layout consistency with title 'Coming Soon: Future Attractions' and subtitle describing the expansion timeline. Structure with year headings and attraction cards within each year group. Include the attractions data inline as a typed array matching requirements REQ-2 through REQ-8.
Import and add UpcomingAttractionsSection component to the home page between UpcomingExpansionsSection and TeaserSection to maintain logical flow of future content sections.

requirements.summary: Add Starr Eyes restaurant to 2027 attractions with upscale horror-themed dining description
acceptanceCriteria: Restaurant appears under 2027 section
Includes name 'Starr Eyes' and description
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

file_operations.description: Add Starr Eyes restaurant entry to 2027 attractions array with name, type 'Restaurant', description highlighting upscale horror-themed dining experience with neon stars and eerie ambiance. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/starr-eyes-restaurant.dim_800x600.png. Include card layout with image, name, type badge, and description text.

requirements.summary: Add Lone Starr stunt show to 2028 attractions with action-packed live stunt performance description
acceptanceCriteria: Show appears under 2028 section
Includes name 'Lone Starr' and description of stunt show
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

file_operations.description: Add Lone Starr stunt show entry to 2028 attractions array with name, type 'Stunt Show', description featuring action-packed live stunt performances in western horror setting with dangerous tricks. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/lone-starr-stunt-show.dim_800x600.png. Use consistent card styling with other attraction cards.

requirements.summary: Add Chaos Breaths themed land to 2029 attractions featuring multiple shows and character meet-and-greets
acceptanceCriteria: Land appears under 2029 section with name 'Chaos Breaths'
Description mentions it's a new themed land with shows and character interactions
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

file_operations.description: Add Chaos Breaths themed land entry to 2029 attractions array with name, type 'Themed Land', description highlighting it as a major new land featuring chaotic breath effects, dark atmosphere, multiple live shows, and all costume character meet-and-greets. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/chaos-breaths-land.dim_1000x600.png. Use larger card format to emphasize it as a major expansion containing sub-attractions.

requirements.summary: Add Fire over Water show as featured attraction within Chaos Breaths land with water and fire special effects description
acceptanceCriteria: Show is listed as part of Chaos Breaths land attractions
Name is 'Fire over Water'
Description highlights water and fire effects
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

file_operations.description: Add Fire over Water show as a sub-attraction within the Chaos Breaths land card in 2029. Include name, type 'Live Show', description emphasizing dramatic water and fire special effects spectacle. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/fire-over-water-show.dim_800x600.png. Display as a nested item or sub-card within the Chaos Breaths land entry.

requirements.summary: Add Dragon Lair show as featured attraction within Chaos Breaths land with dragon-themed performance description
acceptanceCriteria: Show is listed as part of Chaos Breaths land attractions
Name is 'Dragon Lair'
Description features dragon theming
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

file_operations.description: Add Dragon Lair show as a sub-attraction within the Chaos Breaths land card in 2029. Include name, type 'Live Show', description featuring menacing dragon presence in lair setting with dragon-themed performance elements. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/dragon-lair-show.dim_800x600.png. Display alongside Fire over Water as a nested item within the Chaos Breaths land entry.

requirements.summary: Add character meet-and-greet information to Chaos Breaths land indicating all costume characters available for photos
acceptanceCriteria: Chaos Breaths land description or card mentions character meet-and-greets
Text indicates all costume characters will be present

file_operations.description: Update Chaos Breaths land description or add a features list to explicitly mention that all costume characters will be available for meet-and-greets and photo opportunities throughout the themed land. Include this information in the main land card text or as a highlighted feature bullet point.

requirements.summary: Add Under the Sea live show with pyrotechnic water show description and Six Flags America easter egg reference
acceptanceCriteria: Show appears in upcoming attractions with name 'Under the Sea'
Description mentions live show with pyrotechnic effects
Description includes subtle reference or easter egg to Six Flags America
Uses generated AI image with cartoon/horror/graffiti style

file_operations.description: Add Under the Sea live show to one of the year groupings (2027, 2028, or 2029 based on overall timeline balance). Include name, type 'Live Show', description highlighting underwater ocean scene with sea creatures, pyrotechnic effects bursting from water, and a subtle Six Flags America easter egg reference integrated naturally into the description text. Reference the generated image at frontend/public/assets/generated/under-the-sea-show.dim_800x600.png.

requirements.summary: Render all generated AI images for upcoming attractions as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated directory
acceptanceCriteria: All attraction images load from frontend/public/assets/generated
Images display in attraction cards with proper sizing
Error handling for missing images is in place

file_operations.description: Ensure all attraction cards use img elements with src paths pointing to /assets/generated/<filename> for the six required images: starr-eyes-restaurant.dim_800x600.png, lone-starr-stunt-show.dim_800x600.png, chaos-breaths-land.dim_1000x600.png, fire-over-water-show.dim_800x600.png, dragon-lair-show.dim_800x600.png, and under-the-sea-show.dim_800x600.png. Add onError handlers with fallback placeholder or error state display. Apply appropriate sizing with object-fit cover and aspect ratio constraints matching the attraction card design pattern used in other section components.
